problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Spintronics for low-power data storage is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
